API docs by Redocly

Wellness Journey Builder API (1.0.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

API for importing and managing delivery orders

Flows

Create a new flow

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
object (Flows)

Responses

Production server

https://wjb-api.brainybobs.xyz/api/v1/flows

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "type": "flows",
    • "attributes": {
      • "title": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "isActive": true
      }
    }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",
    • "type": "flows",
    • "attributes": {
      • "title": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "isActive": true,
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    }
}

Retrieve a list of flows

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
query Parameters
page
integer
Default: 1

Page number for pagination

limit
integer
Default: 10

Number of items per page for pagination

Responses

Production server

https://wjb-api.brainybobs.xyz/api/v1/flows

Response samples

  • 200
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",
      • "type": "flows",
      • "attributes": {
        • "title": "string",
        • "description": "string",
        • "isActive": true,
        • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
        }
      }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "totalItems": 0,
    • "totalPages": 0,
    • "currentPage": 0
    }
}

Retrieve a specific flow by its ID

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
path Parameters
flowId
required
string^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]...
Example: 30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66

Responses

Production server

https://wjb-api.brainybobs.xyz/api/v1/flows/{flowId}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",
  • "type": "flows",
  • "attributes": {
    • "title": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "isActive": true,
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Delete a specific flow by its ID

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
path Parameters
flowId
required
string^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]...
Example: 30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66

Responses

Production server

https://wjb-api.brainybobs.xyz/api/v1/flows/{flowId}

Response samples

  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": "string"
}

Update a specific flow by its ID

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
path Parameters
flowId
required
string^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]...
Example: 30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66
Request Body schema: application/json
required
type
required
string
Value: "flows"
required
object

Responses

Production server

https://wjb-api.brainybobs.xyz/api/v1/flows/{flowId}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "type": "flows",
  • "attributes": {
    • "title": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "isActive": true
    }
}

  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",
  • "type": "flows",
  • "attributes": {
    • "title": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "isActive": true,

    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }

Create a new node within a specific flow

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
path Parameters
flowId
required
string^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]...
Example: 30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66
Request Body schema: application/json
required
type
required
string
Value: "nodes"
required
object

Responses

Production server

https://wjb-api.brainybobs.xyz/api/v1/flows/{flowId}/edges

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "type": "nodes",
  • "attributes": {
    • "title": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "type": "string",
    • "inputType": "string",
    • "attributeKey": "string"
    }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",
  • "type": "nodes",
  • "attributes": {
    • "title": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "type": "string",
    • "inputType": "string",
    • "attributeKey": "string",
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
path Parameters
flowId
required
string^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]...
Example: 30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66

https://wjb-api.brainybobs.xyz/api/v1/flows/{flowId}/edges

  • 200
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",

path Parameters
flowId

nodeId

Offers

Create a new offer within a specific flow

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
path Parameters
flowId
required
string^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]...
Example: 30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66
Request Body schema: application/json
required
type
required
string
Value: "offers"
required
object

Responses

Production server

https://wjb-api.brainybobs.xyz/api/v1/flows/{flowId}/offers

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "type": "offers",
  • "attributes": {
    • "name": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "isActive": true
    }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",
  • "type": "offers",
  • "attributes": {
    • "name": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "isActive": true
    }
}

Create a new condition for a specific offer

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
path Parameters
offerId
required
string (Guid) ^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]...
Example: 30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66
Request Body schema: application/json
required
type
required
string
Value: "condition-groups"
required
object
object

Responses

Production server

https://wjb-api.brainybobs.xyz/api/v1/offers/{offerId}/condition-groups

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "type": "condition-groups",
  • "attributes": {
    • "target": "edge"
    },
  • "relationships": {
    • "conditions": {
      • "data": [
        • {
          • "type": "conditions"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",
  • "type": "condition-groups",
  • "attributes": {
    • "target": "edge"
    },
  • "relationships": {
    • "conditions": {
      • "data": [
        • {
          • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",
          • "type": "conditions"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
}

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
path Parameters
offerId
required
string (Guid) ^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]...
Example: 30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66

  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json

  • "data": [
    • {
      • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",

        • "target": "edge"
        },

              • "type": "conditions"

            ]
          }
        }
      }
    ]
}

Options

Create a new option for a specific node

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
path Parameters
nodeId
required
string (Guid) ^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]...
Example: 30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66
Request Body schema: application/json
required
type
required
string
Value: "options"
required
object

Responses

Production server

https://wjb-api.brainybobs.xyz/api/v1/nodes/{nodeId}/options

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "type": "options",
  • "attributes": {
    • "label": "string",
    • "value": "string",
    • "displayOrder": 0
    }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",
  • "type": "options",
  • "attributes": {
    • "label": "string",
    • "value": "string",
    • "displayOrder": 0,
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

    • "displayOrder": 0,
    • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    }
}

ConditionGroups

Create a new condition group for a specific option

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
path Parameters
optionId
required
string (Guid) ^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]...
Example: 30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66
Request Body schema: application/json
required
type
required
string
Value: "condition-groups"
required
object
object

Responses

Production server

https://wjb-api.brainybobs.xyz/api/v1/options/{optionId}/condition-groups

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "type": "condition-groups",
  • "attributes": {
    • "target": "edge"
    },
  • "relationships": {
    • "conditions": {
      • "data": [
        • {
          • "type": "conditions"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",
  • "type": "condition-groups",
  • "attributes": {
    • "target": "edge"
    },
  • "relationships": {
    • "conditions": {
      • "data": [
        • {
          • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",
          • "type": "conditions"
          }
        ]
      }
    }
}

Edges

Retrieve a list of edges within a specific flow

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
path Parameters
edgeId
required
string^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]...
Example: 30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66

Responses

Production server

https://wjb-api.brainybobs.xyz/api/v1/edges/{edgeId}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "data": {
    • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",
    • "type": "edges",
    • "attributes": {
      • "priority": 0,
      • "from": "string",
      • "to": "string"
      },
    • "relationships": {
      • "conditionGroups": {
        • "data": [
          • {
            • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",
            • "type": "condition-groups"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
}

cookieAuth
path Parameters
edgeId
required

  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": "string"
}

Conditions

Create a new condition for a specific edge

Authorizations:
cookieAuth
path Parameters
conditionGroupId
required
string^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]...
Example: 30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66
Request Body schema: application/json
required
type
required
string
Value: "conditions"
required
object

Responses

Production server

https://wjb-api.brainybobs.xyz/api/v1/condition-groups/{conditionGroupId}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "type": "conditions",
  • "attributes": {
    • "target": "edge",
    • "operator": "equals",
    • "attributeKey": "string",
    • "value": "string"
    }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 404
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "30dd879c-ee2f-11db-8314-0800200c9a66",
  • "type": "conditions",
  • "attributes": {
    • "target": "edge",
    • "operator": "equals",
    • "attributeKey": "string",
    • "value": "string"
    }
}
